slipBaseCommitMessage: Harden Slip settlement and AI boundaries
note: Built from the clean hardened Slip base commit plus the adjacent Slip workspace's Node ESM compatibility patch. The patch makes Codama-generated relative imports explicit .js or /index.js specifiers, wires the fixer into regeneration/build, and adds an actual Node ESM import gate. Without it the packed SDK failed in Tissue with ERR_UNSUPPORTED_DIR_IMPORT even though Slip's Vite-based tests passed. The patch is retained in ../slip for review and must be committed there before any public package release.
